# Pomelo v1 — Architecture Plan

**Generated by /plan-eng-review on 2026-05-16**
**Design doc:** `~/.gstack/projects/pomelo/ananth-unknown-design-20260516-134052.md`
**Status:** REVIEWED

---

## Scope Decision (D1)

**v1 (this build):** Auth + qualifying chat + lazy chapter generation + course dashboard + habit mechanic

**NOT in scope (v1.5):**
- Per-chapter quiz (3–5 MCQ) — deferred; quiz is validation-layer, not core value proposition
- Depth slider (1–5 per chapter) — deferred; zero demand evidence for this feature specifically
- PWA installability (service worker, Web App Manifest install prompt) — deferred; mobile-responsive layout IS in scope, installable PWA is not

**NOT in scope (v1 monetization):**
- Payment walls, Stripe integration, subscription gating — free-first; add monetization after first real users

---

## Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| Frontend | Next.js 14 (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS |
| Auth | Supabase Auth (magic link) |
| Database | Supabase (PostgreSQL + RLS) |
| AI | Claude API (Anthropic) — qualifying chat + chapter generation |
| Email | Resend |
| Cron | Vercel Cron (hourly, TypeScript, colocated) |
| Deployment | Vercel Pro (required: 25s serverless timeout for streaming) |

---

## System Architecture

```
User Browser
     │
     ▼
┌────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│          Next.js App (Vercel Pro)          │
│                                            │
│  /app                                      │
│    /page.tsx              (landing)        │
│    /(auth)/login/page.tsx (magic link)     │
│    /(app)                                  │
│      /courses/new/page.tsx (qualifying)    │
│      /courses/[id]/page.tsx  (dashboard)   │
│      /courses/[id]/chapters/[cId]/         │
│                  page.tsx  (chapter view)  │
│                                            │
│  /api                                      │
│    /qualifying-chat/route.ts (streaming)   │
│    /courses/route.ts         (POST: create)│
│    /chapters/[id]/route.ts   (GET: stream) │
│    /chapters/[id]/retry/     (POST: retry) │
│    /cron/reminders/route.ts  (habit email) │
└───────────┬─────────────────────┬──────────┘
            │                     │
            ▼                     ▼
       Supabase              Claude API
   (auth + DB)             (streaming)
            │
            ▼
          Resend
      (habit emails)
```

---

## Architecture Decisions

| # | Decision | Chosen | Rationale |
|---|----------|--------|-----------|
| D2 | Chapter generation | **Streaming** (ReadableStream) | User sees words appear live. Zero extra infra. Requires Vercel Pro. |
| D3 | Qualifying conv. state | **Supabase qualifying_sessions** | Resumable on browser close. Audit trail for prompt tuning. |
| D4→D8 | Habit reminder cron | **Vercel Cron + TypeScript** | One system boundary (not three). Timezone logic testable in TS. |
| D5 | Qualifying termination | **Claude tool_use** (`finish_qualifying`) | Type-safe structured output. Reliable in production. |
| D6 | Test Claude API | **Mock in unit tests + eval suite** | Fast CI, zero cost per PR. Real evals after prompt changes. |
| D9 | Chapter gen concurrency | **Atomic check-and-set SQL** | `UPDATE WHERE status=pending` prevents double-triggering. |
| D10 | Knowledge persistence | **Supabase JSONB** (courses.user_profile) | In-stack, zero deps. Cross-session memory deferred to v2. |

---

## Data Model

```sql
-- Qualifying sessions (resumable 5–10 turn conversation)
CREATE TABLE qualifying_sessions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id),
  topic TEXT NOT NULL,
  turns JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',  -- [{role, content, timestamp}]
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', -- active | complete | abandoned
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Courses
CREATE TABLE courses (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id),
  topic TEXT NOT NULL,
  qualifying_session_id UUID REFERENCES qualifying_sessions(id),
  user_profile JSONB NOT NULL, -- { known_topics: [], gap_topics: [], experience_level: string }
  daily_goal INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Chapters (stubs created at course creation, content generated lazily)
CREATE TABLE chapters (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  course_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES courses(id),
  chapter_index INTEGER NOT NULL,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  summary TEXT NOT NULL,
  estimated_minutes INTEGER NOT NULL,
  content TEXT,           -- NULL until generated
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', -- pending | generating | done | failed
  error TEXT,
  generation_started_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  generated_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  UNIQUE(course_id, chapter_index)
);
-- Index: chapters(course_id)

-- Chapter completion tracking
CREATE TABLE chapter_progress (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id),
  chapter_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES chapters(id),
  opened_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  UNIQUE(user_id, chapter_id)
);
-- Index: chapter_progress(user_id, chapter_id)

-- Habit reminders
CREATE TABLE habit_reminders (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id),
  course_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES courses(id),
  reminder_hour INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  timezone TEXT NOT NULL,      -- IANA timezone string, e.g. 'America/New_York'
  utc_offset_hours INTEGER,    -- cached UTC offset for cron bucketing
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  last_sent_date DATE,
  UNIQUE(user_id, course_id)
);
-- Index: habit_reminders(utc_offset_hours, is_active)
```

### RLS Policies (required — not an afterthought)

```sql
-- All tables: users can only read/write their own rows
ALTER TABLE qualifying_sessions ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
CREATE POLICY "users own qualifying_sessions"
  ON qualifying_sessions FOR ALL
  USING (user_id = auth.uid());

-- (same pattern for courses, chapters, chapter_progress, habit_reminders)
-- API routes use service_role key (bypasses RLS for server-side operations)
```

---

## Key Codepath Descriptions

### Qualifying chat turn (POST /api/qualifying-chat)

```
Request: { sessionId?: string, topic?: string, userMessage: string }

1. Auth check → 401 if not logged in
2. Validate with Zod
3a. If no sessionId: INSERT qualifying_session(user_id, topic, turns=[])
3b. If sessionId: SELECT qualifying_session WHERE id=X AND user_id=auth_user (not found → 404)
4. Append { role: 'user', content: userMessage } to turns
5. Call Claude with:
   - messages: [...session.turns]
   - tools: [finish_qualifying({ chapters, user_profile })]
   - system: [qualifying conversation system prompt]
6a. If stop_reason = 'tool_use': 
   - Extract finish_qualifying args
   - INSERT course(user_id, topic, user_profile, qualifying_session_id)
   - INSERT N chapter stubs (pending status)
   - UPDATE qualifying_session.status = 'complete'
   - INSERT habit_reminder(user_id, course_id, timezone from browser)
   - Return { done: true, courseId }
6b. If stop_reason = 'end_turn':
   - Append { role: 'assistant', content: response } to turns
   - UPDATE qualifying_session.turns, qualifying_session.updated_at
   - Return streaming response (assistant message)
7. On Claude error: return 500 + retry guidance
```

### Chapter generation (GET /api/chapters/[id])

```
1. Auth check → 401
2. SELECT chapter JOIN courses WHERE chapter.id=X AND courses.user_id=auth.uid() → 403 if not found
3a. content IS NOT NULL AND status='done': return { content, status: 'done' }
3b. status='generating' AND generation_started_at < NOW()-90s:
   → UPDATE status='pending' (reset stale generation)
   → fall through to 3d
3c. status='generating' AND generation_started_at > NOW()-90s:
   → return { status: 'generating' }  (client polls)
3d. status='failed': return { status: 'failed', error }
3e. status='pending':
   → Atomic check-and-set:
     UPDATE chapters SET status='generating', generation_started_at=NOW()
     WHERE id=X AND status='pending'
     RETURNING id
   → If rowsAffected=0: another request won the race → return { status: 'generating' }
   → If rowsAffected=1: call Claude, stream response
   → On stream complete (onFinal):
     UPDATE chapters SET content=fullText, status='done', generated_at=NOW()
   → On stream error:
     UPDATE chapters SET status='failed', error=message
```

### Habit reminder (POST /api/cron/reminders — Vercel Cron, hourly)

```
1. Verify Vercel Cron secret header
2. Get current UTC hour
3. SELECT users WHERE:
   - utc_offset_hours is set AND
   - (current_utc_hour + utc_offset_hours) % 24 = 20 (8pm local) AND
   - is_active = true AND
   - last_sent_date != today (UTC date)
4. For each user:
   - Check if daily goal met (COUNT chapter_progress today >= daily_goal)
   - If not met: send Resend email
   - UPDATE last_sent_date = today (regardless of email success)
   - Log failure but don't throw (don't block other users)
```

---

## Parallelization Strategy

Two independent workstreams for the build:

```
Lane A: Data layer (blocks Lane B)
  └── Supabase setup → schema migrations → RLS policies → seed data

Lane B: UI shell (independent)
  └── Next.js app scaffold → Tailwind → auth pages → route structure

Lane C (after A+B): Feature lanes (parallel)
  ├── C1: Qualifying chat (depends on: qualifying_sessions table, Claude lib)
  ├── C2: Chapter generation (depends on: chapters table, Claude lib)
  └── C3: Habit mechanic (depends on: habit_reminders table, Resend, Vercel Cron)

Lane D (after C1+C2): Integration
  └── Course dashboard → chapter progress → end-to-end flow
```

Merge conflicts possible if C1/C2/C3 all touch `lib/claude.ts` simultaneously — coordinate or assign one owner to that file.

---

## Failure Modes

| Codepath | How it fails | Test covers? | Error handling? | User sees? |
|----------|-------------|--------------|-----------------|-----------|
| Qualifying chat: Claude timeout | 500 after 25s | GAP | Retry once, then 500 | Error toast — critical gap if no retry |
| Chapter gen: Claude timeout | Stream cut off at 25s | GAP | status=failed, retry button | "Generation failed, retry" ✓ |
| Chapter gen: concurrent open | Double-trigger | GAP (after D9 fix) | Atomic SQL check | Second tab polls ✓ |
| Qualifying: browser close mid-chat | Session in DB | Covered by D3 | Resume on reload | Resumes ✓ |
| Habit email: Resend failure | Silent skip | GAP | Log but don't block | No email (silent) — critical gap |
| Habit email: invalid timezone | Skip reminder | GAP | Validate at course creation | No email (silent) — medium gap |

**Critical gaps requiring tests:**
1. Qualifying chat Claude timeout → user sees retry guidance (not a white screen)
2. Resend failure → logged, `last_sent_date` still updates (don't retry tomorrow)
3. Timezone validation at course creation (reject invalid IANA strings via Intl API)

---

## NOT in Scope

- Per-chapter quiz — v1.5
- Depth slider — v1.5
- PWA installability — v1.5
- gbrain knowledge persistence — v2
- Monetization / payment walls — post-validation
- YouTube transcript integration — v2
- Streak mechanics — v2
- Native mobile app — v3

## What Already Exists

- No existing code (greenfield)
- Supabase auth patterns: `createServerClient` from `@supabase/ssr`, no custom auth
- Next.js App Router streaming: built-in `Response` with `ReadableStream` or `StreamingTextResponse` from Vercel AI SDK
- Claude tool_use: first-class in `@anthropic-ai/sdk`
- Resend: `npm install resend`, minimal API
- Vercel Cron: `vercel.json` `crons` array, zero config

---

## Implementation Tasks

Synthesized from review findings. Each task derives from a specific finding.

- [ ] **T1 (P1, human: ~1h / CC: ~10min)** — Data layer — Write all 5 Supabase migrations (qualifying_sessions, courses, chapters, chapter_progress, habit_reminders) with indexes + RLS policies
  - Surfaced by: Architecture Review — RLS policies are security-critical; must be day-1 not afterthought
  - Files: `supabase/migrations/`
  - Verify: `supabase db reset && supabase db push` — all tables exist with correct RLS

- [ ] **T2 (P1, human: ~2h / CC: ~20min)** — Chapter generation — Implement atomic check-and-set in GET /api/chapters/[id]
  - Surfaced by: Outside Voice + Architecture Review D9 — concurrent tabs double-bill Claude
  - Files: `app/api/chapters/[id]/route.ts`
  - Verify: open same chapter in 2 tabs simultaneously — only 1 Claude call fires

- [ ] **T3 (P1, human: ~2h / CC: ~15min)** — Chapter generation — Implement streaming response + onFinal persistence
  - Surfaced by: Architecture Review D2 — chapter content must be persisted after stream completes
  - Files: `app/api/chapters/[id]/route.ts`, `lib/claude.ts`
  - Verify: open chapter → words stream in → refresh → served instantly from DB

- [ ] **T4 (P1, human: ~1h / CC: ~10min)** — Qualifying chat — Implement Claude tool_use with finish_qualifying tool
  - Surfaced by: Code Quality D5 — text parsing is fragile; tool_use is the correct primitive
  - Files: `app/api/qualifying-chat/route.ts`, `lib/prompts/qualifying.ts`
  - Verify: complete 5-turn qualifying chat → course created with chapter stubs

- [ ] **T5 (P2, human: ~1h / CC: ~10min)** — Chapter failure recovery — Add POST /api/chapters/[id]/retry + UI retry button
  - Surfaced by: Outside Voice — failed chapters with no retry = users stuck
  - Files: `app/api/chapters/[id]/retry/route.ts`, `app/(app)/courses/[id]/chapters/[cId]/page.tsx`
  - Verify: manually set chapter.status='failed' → retry button appears → chapter regenerates

- [ ] **T6 (P2, human: ~2h / CC: ~15min)** — Habit mechanic — Implement Vercel Cron + TypeScript timezone logic + Resend
  - Surfaced by: Outside Voice D8 — pg_cron has 3 system boundaries; Vercel Cron colocated + testable
  - Files: `app/api/cron/reminders/route.ts`, `vercel.json`, `lib/email/habit-reminder.ts`
  - Verify: unit test — user with utc_offset=-5 at 20:00 UTC-5 gets email; user with goal met does not

- [ ] **T7 (P3, human: ~2h / CC: ~20min)** — Tests — Write Vitest unit tests for all API route happy paths + error paths
  - Surfaced by: Test Review — 0/28 codepaths tested (greenfield)
  - Files: `src/__tests__/api/qualifying-chat.test.ts`, `chapters.test.ts`, `cron-reminders.test.ts`
  - Verify: `vitest run` passes with Claude mocked

- [ ] **T8 (P3, human: ~2h / CC: ~15min)** — Tests — Write Playwright E2E test for complete qualifying chat → dashboard flow
  - Surfaced by: Test Review — [→E2E] qualifying chat is the highest-risk user flow
  - Files: `e2e/qualifying-chat.spec.ts`
  - Verify: `playwright test` → creates real course in dev Supabase

- [ ] **T9 (P3, human: ~30min / CC: ~5min)** — Tests — Add timezone validation at course creation (reject invalid IANA strings)
  - Surfaced by: Failure Modes — invalid timezone silently skips habit reminders
  - Files: `app/api/courses/route.ts`
  - Verify: POST with timezone='garbage' → 400 error; 'America/New_York' → 200

---

## Recommended Build Order

1. **Week 1:** T1 (schema) + Next.js scaffold + auth pages
2. **Week 1–2:** T4 (qualifying chat) + T2+T3 (chapter generation, in parallel)
3. **Week 2:** T5 (retry) + T6 (habit mechanic) + T9 (timezone validation)
4. **Week 2:** T7+T8 (tests, run alongside feature work)
5. **Week 2:** Dashboard, chapter progress, end-to-end integration
